gold: Anna Hanım merhabalar. Ben son internet faturamın miktarını öğrenmek istiyorum. Acaba ödendi mi, ödenmedi mi, o konuda bilgi verebilir misiniz acaba?

sigWerErrors.reason: 'Faturamın' (my bill) vs 'faturanın' (your bill) changes the possessive, but the overall intent of the sentence (asking about the last internet bill) remains clear.
Difference is only in punctuation (comma vs question mark), which does not affect meaning.
The addition of 'da' (also) slightly emphasizes the request but does not change the overall meaning.
